rationale: The cited paper appears only in the General Discussion/Future Research section, where it is grouped with other studies to illustrate that sharing experiences can affect evaluations. Although the citing paper briefly summarizes one finding from Raghunathan and Corfman (2006), it is not used to build hypotheses, define constructs, choose methods, or interpret the main experimental results. The citing paper's core contribution is developed around relationship time perspective and joint variety choice without relying on this citation as a direct conceptual or empirical pillar.
